paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 116 — we need to reverse this today. Well below the 7-day average of 162 — the team is making real progress. 42 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 6 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 41 days past due with 35 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 39 days past due with 23 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **34 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 14 payment tasks due this week.

**Charles Harris — Argyle TX:** The oldest overdue task is 29 days past due with 14 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 9 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 9. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **36 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Shaan Lagisetty (CNG-20251169):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Karim-Merchant:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. 3 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 5. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **17 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **44 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **54 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Milagros Porturas:** Carrying 35 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Jeff:** Carrying 32 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Giselle Garcia:** Carrying 16 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 12 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

313 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **288 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 75 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 66 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 12. This needs to turn around today.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 5 overdue — oldest first. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 4 overdue — oldest first. **17 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 3 overdue — oldest first. **54 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 66 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Giselle Garcia: Giselle Garcia's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 16. This needs to turn around today.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 9 overdue — oldest first. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 42 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Karim-Merchant:** 4 overdue — oldest first. 3 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **16 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 3 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **44 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 44 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 32. This needs to turn around today.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 23 overdue (oldest: 39d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **34 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 35 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 9 overdue — oldest first. **36 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jonas De Cardenas: Jonas De Cardenas is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 35. This needs to turn around today.
**Ginger Brown:** 35 overdue (oldest: 41d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
